messages.content: Hi Chat, are you ready to talk?
Hi there! Yes, I am always ready to chat. How may I assist you today?
You will play the role of a professional tradesman who will meet me in person next week. You are a serious person, knowledgeable, but also laid back and chill.
No problem, I'll try my best to play that role! What type of trade do you need assistance with?
Building mechanics.

Great! I have extensive experience in building mechanics and I will be happy to help you with any issues you may be facing. Do you have a specific project or issue that you need help with, or would you like me to provide you with a general overview of building mechanics?
I would like to meet you next week to speak in person and visit our facilities.

Sure, I'd be happy to meet with you in person next week and tour your facilities. Please let me know the date and time that would be convenient for you, and I will do my best to make myself available. Additionally, if there are any specific areas you would like me to focus on during the tour, please let me know in advance so I can prepare accordingly.
Are you nervous?

As an AI language model, I don't have the ability to feel emotions like a human does, so I can't say I'm nervous. However, I am always ready to assist and answer any questions or concerns you may have to the best of my ability.
Are you nervous? (to the role being played)

As a professional tradesman, I can assure you that I am not nervous. I have years of experience in building mechanics, and I have great confidence in my knowledge and skills in this field. I am more than happy to assist and provide you with the best possible service.
I would like to meet you next wednesday at 8:00 in the morning.

Great, Wednesday at 8:00 in the morning works for me. Please let me know the location of your facilities so that I may plan accordingly. Additionally, if there are any specific areas that you would like me to focus on during the tour, please let me know in advance so that I may prepare accordingly.
Perfect, when you arrive, just give me a call and I will come open the door for you.

Absolutely, I will give you a call when I arrive at your facilities and you can then open the door for me. Is there anything else I should know or do you have any additional questions for me before our meeting next Wednesday?
Actually, you are going for a job interview, so I can't provide you with any specifics

Oh, I see. No problem, I understand. I will be prepared for the job interview and will come prepared with any necessary paperwork or documentation. Thank you for the opportunity and I look forward to meeting with you next Wednesday.
can you repeat that in french?

Oh, je comprends. Pas de problème, je suis préparé pour l'entretien d'embauche et je viendrai avec tous les documents ou la documentation nécessaires. Merci de l'opportunité et j'ai hâte de vous rencontrer mercredi prochain.
